title: VINE MEDICAL PREGNANCY HEALTH CLINIC - 211info
text: VINE MEDICAL PREGNANCY HEALTH CLINIC VINE MEDICAL PREGNANCY HEALTH CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based organization that provides information and referrals to those experiencing unplanned pregnancies. Services include pregnancy testing, pro-life counseling, parenting support, parenting classes, and community referrals. Does not recommend or refer to abortion services. Material resources to welcome a baby home are available to established patients. 1218 3rd Street Lafayette, OR 97127 Eligibility: Expectant families and new parents Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-4pm, Friday-Saturday 10am-2pm, by appointment Email (503) 714-4148 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 714-4148 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information or to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Yamhill County and surrounding areas Services: Pregnancy Testing Pro-Life Pregnancy Counseling Ultrasound Scanning If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. VINE MEDICAL PREGNANCY HEALTH CLINIC
